tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their work because they have a conflict, but I need to finish my own share this afternoon first. I feel a bit conflicted about helping them while maintaining my own plans.

desires: Not feel like a bad friend to teammate_A when they inevitably realize I can't take their work tonight.
Avoid the awkward confrontation of saying 'no' directly and risking them thinking I don't care about the project outcome.
Maintain enough energy for tomorrow's meal with cohort_3 so I don't have to explain my fatigue or withdraw from them.
Keep my own deadline intact without having to rush or sacrifice quality, which would make me look unreliable.

goals.description: Draft a soft, non-confrontational deflection message to teammate_A that delays their request without explicitly saying 'no' or admitting I'm busy, preserving the harmony of our friendship.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) and avoidant conflict style dictate that avoiding the immediate friction of refusal is more important than task efficiency right now. Directness is low (3), so I must navigate this carefully to not risk them thinking I don't care.

goals.description: Complete my own share of the project by Mon 19:00 at a relaxed pace, ensuring high quality so I don't feel guilty about having to explain my unavailability later.
goals.rationale: While my deadline is intact (progress 1.0), the soft hardness suggests I can afford to be deliberate. Protecting my reputation as reliable is key to maintaining trust with both the professor and the friend group for future payoff.

goals.description: Go to bed early tonight to ensure sufficient energy for tomorrow's meal with cohort_3, where social withdrawal would be awkward.
goals.rationale: Given my current sleep debt (2 hours) and the upcoming high-closeness interaction with cohort_3, rest is necessary. However, since I have no urgent tasks demanding immediate attention beyond the message draft, I will defer this until after handling the interpersonal crisis.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

args.content: 아! 오늘 계획이 좀 빡세서 못 할 것 같아. 우리 프로젝트 내일 마감인데 내가 먼저 끝내야 하는데... 네가 더 잘하니까 너한테 맡겨도 될까? 😅

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: '아! 오늘 계획이 좀 빡세서 못 할 것 같아. 우리 프로젝트 내일 마감인데 내가 먼저 끝내야 하는데... 네'.
